title: Calypso's Mobs
description: Cute and useful creatures (well… so far there’s only one).
body: # Calypso's Mobs ### 🧪 _A small mod with potential to grow_ We’re learning creature AI by developing this mod. At this moment, it features just one mob—a fiery little helper you’ll definitely want to meet. **Required Dependencies:** [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) | [Kotlin for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) | [SmartBrainLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/smartbrainlib) *** ## 🔥 Furnace Sprite ![Summon Furnace Sprite](https://github.com/SettingDust/CalypsosMobs/blob/main/docs/Summon_Furnace_Sprite.gif?raw=true) A cute, animated sprite disguised as a furnace. It smelts nearby items **automatically—no fuel required**. *** ### 🛠️ Crafting You can craft it with either of these recipes: ![Crafting A](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SettingDust/CalypsosMobs/refs/heads/main/docs/Furnace_Sprite_Crafting_Method_A.png) ![Crafting B](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SettingDust/CalypsosMobs/refs/heads/main/docs/Furnace_Sprite_Crafting_Method_B.png) *** ### ⚙️ How It Works ![Furnace Sprite picks up item](https://github.com/SettingDust/CalypsosMobs/blob/main/docs/Furnace_Sprite_picks_up_item.gif?raw=true) * Picks up smeltable items on the ground * Smelts them automatically * Spits out the results *** ![Furnace Sprite burns faster and faster](https://github.com/SettingDust/CalypsosMobs/blob/main/docs/Furnace_Sprite_burns_faster_and_faster.gif?raw=true) * Heats up over time for faster smelting * Cools down when idle *** ### 🌙 Day & Night Behavior ![Furnace Sprite falls asleep](https://github.com/SettingDust/CalypsosMobs/blob/main/docs/Furnace_Sprite_falls_asleep.gif?raw=true) * At night, it falls asleep if idle * Disguises itself as a regular furnace ![Furnace Sprite wakes up](https://github.com/SettingDust/CalypsosMobs/blob/main/docs/Furnace_Sprite_wakes_up.gif?raw=true) * Holding a smeltable item nearby will wake it up! * Or… you could just give it a gentle tap *** ## 🧪 More to Come… This mod began as a small project to help us learn creature AI. As we grow, we’ll use what we’ve learned to create even more exciting and creative mods in the future. Special thanks to my friend [@wmmzkl](https://x.com/wmmzkl?s=09) for the congratulatory illustration.
